exercises.code:
import sqlite3
c=sqlite3.connect(':memory:')
c.executescript('create table pairs(id text); create table dec(pair_id text); insert into pairs values ("p1"),("p2"); insert into dec values ("p1");')
pairs = [r[0] for r in c.execute('select id from pairs')]
dec = {r[0] for r in c.execute('select pair_id from dec')}
print([p for p in pairs if p not in dec])

c=sqlite3.connect(':memory:')
